name: dealer.contacts
query: select id as source_id, uuid, group_id, country_id, province_id, city_id, slug, towkay_uuid, name, display_name, first_name, last_name, phone, secondary_phone, email, address, address_2, postcode, national_identity_number, tax_identification_number, last_login_at, secondary_email, password, fcm_uuids, social_accounts, notification_preferences, app_allow_notification, app_allow_sound, accept_marketing_updates, locale, first_login, last_login, first_login_app, last_login_app, last_activity_at, google_account_id, email_verified_at, stripe_account_id, has_payment_card, default_payment_card, provider_name, provider_id, additional_data, search_cache, search_cache_status, search_cache_updated_at, is_active, line_user_id, line_display_name, line_account_status, notes, note_updated_at, last_note_by, is_external_agent, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from contacts

name: dealer.company_contacts
query: select id as source_id, user_id, group_id, country_id, province_id, city_id, name, phone, email, address, unique_entity_number, tax_identification_number, national_identity_number, date_of_incorporation, additional_data, search_cache, search_cache_status, search_cache_updated_at, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from company_contacts
